tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Artist: Gavin DeGraw
Song: I Don't Want To Be
Album: Chariot
Tabbed by: Cozza
Email: cozzawozzawozzabear@hotmail.com


INTRO:

[ch]C7[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch] (repeat)


VERSE 1:

[tab][ch]C7[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]C7[/ch]
I don't need to be anything other[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]
Than a prison guard's son[/tab]
[tab][ch]C7[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]C7[/ch]
I don't need to be anything other[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
Than a specialist's son[/tab]
[tab][ch]C7[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]C7[/ch]
I don't have to be anything other[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
Than the birth of two souls in one[/tab]
[tab][ch]C7[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
Part of where I'm going, is knowing where I'm coming from[/tab]


CHORUS:

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]                        [ch]Cm7[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]
I don't want to be anything other than what I've been trying to be lately[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]                     [ch]Bb[/ch]                     [ch]Cm7[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]
All I have to do is think of me and I have peace of mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]           [ch]Eb[/ch]                            [ch]Bb[/ch]
I'm tired of looking round rooms wondering what I gotta do[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]
Or who I'm supposed to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]Cm7[/ch]
I don't want to be anything other than me[/tab]


VERSE 2:

I'm surrounded by liars everywhere I turn
I'm surrounded by imposters everywhere I turn
I'm surrounded by identity crisis everywhere I turn
Am I the only one who noticed?
I can't be the only one who's learned

Can I have everyone's attention please[/tab]

See, not like this and that[/tab]
